channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 : les excellents écouteurs d’Apple chutent déjà sous les 200 euros
item.description: Les AirPods Pro 3 cumulent les qualités : performance acoustique, réduction de bruit active, autonomie, intégration dans l'écosystème Apple... Ils cochent toutes les cases et on les trouve en ce moment à 199 euros au lieu de 249 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Amnezia Free launches in Brazil as citizens turn to VPNs amid new mandatory age checks
item.description: Amnezia VPN has officially expanded its free tier to users in Brazil. Designed strictly to unblock specific platforms, Amnezia Free aims to combat rising internet restrictions without costing users a dime.

item.title: Scientists Pump the Brakes on Psychedelic Antidepressant Hype
item.description: Turns out, it's very hard to remove a test subject's own bias about their psychedelic test treatment.

item.title: US Startup Wants Someone With a ‘History of Being Let Down by Technology’ to ‘Bully’ AI
item.description: The job requires someone to yell at AI chatbots for eight hours.

item.title: This sleek alarm clock uses lights and sounds to help you sleep, focus, and wake up
item.description: Dieter Rams already showed the world that something as mundane as an alarm clock can be beautiful. Balmuda, a Japanese company best known for its steam-infused toasters, has released a travel-friendly alarm clock simply called The Clock. Its minimalist dial is reminiscent of Braun's iconic alarm clocks but goes one step further by replacing traditional […]...

item.title: Amazon Is Hell-Bent on Making Another Phone
item.description: The e-commerce giant seems undeterred by the colossal failure of the Fire Phone more than a decade ago.

item.title: Alexa+ is 'just more delightful,' says Amazon's VP of Alexa and Echo as the service rolls out to thousands of new customers
item.description: As Alexa+ gains ground in the UK, we had the opportunity to catch up with Daniel Rausch, Amazon's VP Alexa and Echo to find out more about the Generative AI rollout so far.

item.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
item.description: Since roughly the turn of the millennium, Google Search has been the bedrock of the web. People loved Google's trustworthy "10 blue links" search experience and its unspoken promise: The website you click is the website you get. Now, Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. […]

item.title: Amazon is reportedly working on a new phone built around Alexa
item.description: Amazon is reportedly planning to re-enter the smartphone market more than 10 years after its last attempt. According to a Reuters report, the mysterious phone is internally codenamed "Transformer" and is being developed by the company’s devices and services unit. There isn’t a whole lot to go on right now, but it probably won’t surprise many to learn that the phone will likely lean heavily on AI. According to Reuters’ sources, Alexa functionality would be a core part of the experience, but Amazon wouldn’t necessarily build a custom OS around its voice assistant. The phone would make buying pro...

item.title: 'I'm Batman': I tested the RayNeo Air 4 Pro Batman Justice Edition - the theme is unapologetically fun and the HDR10 and B&O audio experience is surprisingly good
item.description: The RayNeo Air 4 Pro Batman Justice Edition is a limited collector's variant of RayNeo's latest display glasses. Essentially adding a clip-on Batman mask and themed packaging to the existing hardware that delivers HDR10, Bang & Olufsen audio, and a 201-inch virtual screen.

item.title: « Projet Transformer » : Amazon voudrait relancer un smartphone 12 ans après l’échec du Fire Phone
item.description: Amazon n'a pas complètement abandonné l'idée de percer sur le marché des smartphones. L'entreprise serait en train d'en développer un nouveau.

item.title: ‘Severance’ Star Dichen Lachman Has a New Job: Vampire Slayer
item.description: The Apple TV standout plays a monster hunter in ‘Vampires of the Velvet Lounge,’ which hits theaters March 20.

item.title: Much ado about protein
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Wellness crazes come and go, but protein is forever. At least that's how it feels as the algorithm […]

item.title: How to watch La Liga 2025/26: live stream guide, TV channels and key dates
item.description: With Barcelona defending their crown, here's our full guide to watching La Liga 2025/26 season live streams, broadcasters and TV channels around the world.

item.title: OpenAI is making an all-in-one 'superapp' that combines Codex, ChatGPT, and Atlas browser for maximum productivity
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly working to bring ChatGPT, Atlas and Codex into one app to make it easier for users to interact with AI.

item.title: Have your say — one year after Garmin's divisive Connect+ launch, how do you feel about it now?
item.description: Did you leave Garmin after the divisive launch of Garmin Connect+? Did you subscribe? Vote in our poll.

item.title: I tested the TP-Link Omada EAP787 - an Enterprise-class Wi-Fi 7 ceiling access point for those with infrastructure ambitions
item.description: The TP-Link Omada EAP787 is an Enterprise-class ceiling access point that uses 10GbE PoE++ technology for easy deployment.

item.title: Amazon is making an Alexa phone
item.description: Over 10 years after shelving the Fire Phone, Amazon is reportedly planning to launch another smartphone, this time focused on Alexa. According to Reuters, the phone, which is code-named "Transformer," will center around Amazon's AI assistant, but Alexa won't "necessarily be the primary operating system of the phone." "Transformer" is currently in development in Amazon's […]...

item.title: Aarke's 'stunning' drip coffee maker looks better than ever, with a stylish new colorway that'll add a splash of sophistication to your kitchen
item.description: The Aarke Coffee Maker has a fresh new look for 2026 that fits perfectly with this year's freshest kitchen design trends.

item.title: I tested the Jabra Evolve3 85 - a professional headset built for the office, priced for the boardroom, yet styled for the street
item.description: The Jabra Evolve3 85 offers all the bells and whistles of a call centre headset while retaining the styling and elegance associated with retail-focused products.

item.title: Hachette retire un roman accusé d’avoir été écrit avec l’IA
item.description: « Shy Girl », un roman de Mia Ballard, a connu un gros succès lors de sa publication en autoédition l'an dernier. Flairant le bon coup éditorial, Hachette a acquis les droits pour une sortie en bonne et due forme au Royaume-Uni et aux États-Unis. Mais finalement, la maison d'édition a annulé la sortie américaine et ne sera pas maintenu outre-Manche. En cause : l'usage d'IA générative dans le texte…...

item.title: Windows 11 update breaks OneDrive, Edge and more — here's what to do if you've been hit by this confusing bug
item.description: Confusing Windows 11 bug creeps out of the woodwork to cause chaos with a bunch of apps that use a Microsoft account login.

item.title: 'People were telling me, this is massive' — Assassin's Creed Shadows Yasuke actor reflects on his role in the blockbuster game
item.description: Assassin's Creed Shadows voice actor

item.title: Des tours de piste au milieu de la mer : comment Strava a permis de localiser le porte-avions Charles de Gaulle
item.description: Des journalistes du Monde ont pu, grâce au réseau social sportif Strava, localiser l'emplacement du porte-avions Charles de Gaulle en pleine mer Méditerranée. En cause, l'entraînement sportif d'un officier qui n'avait pas passé son profil en privé.

item.title: Why people really hate AI
item.description: There's a big, and increasing, disconnect in culture right now when it comes to artificial intelligence. Companies of all shapes and sizes are hunting for places to deploy AI and can't stop talking about how this new technology will change everything. But when you ask people about AI, the consistent response is: no thanks. Study […]

item.title: La PlayStation 5 Slim coûte environ 130 euros de moins grâce à cette offre
item.description: La console de Sony, la PlayStation 5 dans sa version Slim sans lecteur Blu-Ray, revient à un super prix. On la trouve en ce moment à 372 euros au lieu de 499 euros grâce à un code promo. On trouve aussi le modèle avec lecteur dans un pack à très bon prix.

item.title: The UK doesn't want to force you to have a digital ID — but a 'trust me bro' approach won't make the cut
item.description: The new voluntary approach to UK digital IDs is a welcome change. But is it enough to ensure our most sensitive data remains private, secured, and free from abuse? The government wants to hear your say.

item.title: The latest OnePlus 15T teasers show it isn't going to be an ordinary mid-ranger — and could challenge the Galaxy S26
item.description: We already know a lot about the OnePlus 15T ahead of its full unveiling next week.

item.title: Teens are suing Elon Musk’s xAI over sexually explicit images, seeking class action status
item.description: 3 high school students from Tennessee filed the lawsuit in California, where xAI is headquartered. Three teenagers in Tennessee sued Elon Musk’s xAI this week, claiming the company’s image-generation tools were used to morph real photos of them into explicitly sexual images.The high school students, who are seeking to proceed under pseudonyms, filed the lawsuit in California, where xAI — Musk’s artificial intelligence company — has its headquarters. They are seeking class-action status in order to represent what the lawsuit says are thousands of victims like themselves who either are minors or...

item.title: Votre Mac va enfin accueillir l’une des meilleures IA
item.description: Google s'apprête à déployer sur macOS une application native pour son IA Gemini. Similaire à celles d'Anthropic et OpenAI, cette nouvelle application permettra aux utilisateurs de Mac d'accéder à Gemini dans de meilleures conditions... en attendant encore mieux.

item.title: Windows 11 : impossible de se connecter à Microsoft Teams, OneDrive ou Edge ? Remerciez la dernière mise à jour
item.description: La mise à jour Windows 11 déployée le 10 mars 2026 met à mal l'identification sur la plupart des applications Microsoft. Il y a une solution de secours.

item.title: Latest Crimson Desert update rolls out extra polish and new tutorial quest
item.description: The day one Crimson Desert update is here and has a few much-needed tweaks.

item.title: Update your iPhone now — Apple issues a rare warning to iOS users as a new hacker threat is discovered
item.description: Apple has warned iOS users to update their iPhones to stay safe against a new hacker threat.

item.title: The ‘Firefly’ Animated Series Will Recast Ron Glass If It Goes Ahead
item.description: Plus, Ryan Gosling wants to be the MCU's Ghost Rider.

item.title: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale 2026: all of the latest deals
item.description: If you’re looking for the best time to get a deal this spring, it might very well be during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, which kicks off at 3:01AM ET on March 25th and runs through 2:59AM ET on April 1st. Some early deals have already begun (we’re compiling them here), but we’ll also be highlighting […]

item.title: Sony removes a staggering 135,000 deepfake songs from music streaming services, but ‘labelling AI material is absolutely the next critical challenge’
item.description: Sony is battling against the rising threat of AI-generated music on streaming services, and now industry giants want clear AI tagging.

item.title: US and friends disrupt world's largest DDoS botnet responsible for record 31.4 Tbps global attacks
item.description: US law enforcement, with help from partners in Canada and Germany, disrupted four of the largest DDoS botnets.

item.title: Save $270 on the Dell Tower Plus: The best business computer we've tested is now $850
item.description: Upgrade your office for under $900 with this high-performance Dell business PC.

item.title: The best iPad deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale — score new iPads at all-time low prices
item.description: Shop the best early iPad deals from Apple during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save on M5 iPads at all-time low prices.

item.title: The best Apple deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale — save on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: Shop all the best Apple deals ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and the M4 iPad Air.

item.title: Iran escalates attacks in Gulf striking one of the region’s major refineries in Kuwait
item.description: Kuwait’s Mina Al-Ahmadi refinery, one of the largest in the Middle East, can process nearly 730,000 barrels of oil per day. Iran defiantly insisted Friday that it would deny its enemies their security and that it was still building missiles nearly three weeks into U.S.-Israeli strikes that have killed a slew of Tehran’s top leaders and hammered its weapons and energy industries.Iran fired on Israel and energy sites in neighboring Gulf Arab states as many in the region marked one of the holiest days on the Muslim calendar.With little information coming out of Iran, it was not clear how much dam...

item.title: Google's best smartwatch ever just got a surprise price cut — get $100 off the outstanding Google Pixel Watch 4
item.description: We love the Google Pixel Watch 4 - and now it's even cheaper thanks to a record-low price at Amazon.
